data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items'. However, while the linked use case describes a scenario where reminders are sent, there is no concrete evidence or API endpoints provided that demonstrate the implementation of this feature. The absence of specific evidence to confirm that reminders are automatically generated for incomplete tasks indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of auto-reminders being triggered for incomplete checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that reminders are sent for incomplete tasks based on the checklist.
